attributes.action: Hold ALL councils and government accountable for putting our lives in danger
attributes.additional_details: Because the councils are NOT doing anything to sort this out.
attributes.background: To take responsibility for putting all road users lives in danger, due to the lack of filling in potholes properly. It is now getting too dangerous to drive on our roads.

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action.

We are not sure how you would like the council and government to be held accountable for potholes.

You may wish to sign the following:

Provide funding to repair severe potholes and compensate drivers
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/760312

Legislate for the repair of potholes within a time frame in the UK
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757761
